text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking down the hallway after<n>training,
when...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
choice_data_list: Good to see you too, Trainer Kiryuin!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
So many things have happened over<n>the last
three years, haven't they?

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't seem like such a long time,<n>but these
last few years have been<n>the most memorable
time of my life.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, I never thought I'd be<n>able to
make a friend I could talk to<n>like this.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
But with your help, I've been able to<n>learn so
much. Thank you, from the<n>bottom of my heart!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I look forward to seeing what's in<n>store for us in
the future, Trainer<n><username>!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
As fellow trainers, let's continue to<n>work
together and give it our all!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Also, if it's all right with you... I was<n>thinking
about inviting both Meek and<n><chrname> out...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
You know... to have a party<n>celebrating all of our
hard work...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
How does karaoke sound? Maybe<n>I'm being a
little too presumptuous,<n>but I've already done
some research<n>on a potential spot.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
The food there looks great, and it's<n>really
popular with the younger crowd.<n>I think they'll
both enjoy it!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Great! They have this neat feature<n>where you
can order food via remote<n>control, so feel free to
use it whenever<n>you like!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We invite <chrname> and Happy<n>Meek, and we all
have a great time<n>singing and eating together.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We invite <chrname> and Happy<n>Meek, and we all
have a great time<n>singing and eating together.
